name: Touch of Revival
descriptionTemplate: "Basic Strike" grants Temporary {STR} and Temporary {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg1]% of Tulu's ATK, while "Basic Defense" grants Temporary {STR} and Temporary {Tentacle DMG} equal to [Arg2]% of Tulu's ATK (effects scale with the levels of "Strike" and "Defense").
